name: PT Bank Jago Tbk
summary: PT Bank Jago Tbk provides various banking products and services for small and medium enterprises, retail, and mass market segments in Indonesia. It offers current accounts, savings products, time deposits, and certificates of deposit. The company also provides various loan products comprising working capital loans, investment loans, consumer loans, mortgages for home and shop house, car/motorcycle loans, multipurpose loans, kredit artos sejahtera, kredit artos manfaat, kredit artos berdikari, and bank guarantee. In addition, it offers foreign currency exchange, transaction shuttle, bill payments, money transfer/RTGS/SKN, clearing, employee payroll facility, and safe deposit boxes, as well as ATM, alto, and prima networking services. It operates through a head office, 2 branch offices, 3 sub-branch offices, and 1 cash office. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Artos Indonesia Tbk and changed its name to PT Bank Jago Tbk in June 2020. PT Bank Jago Tbk was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in South Jakarta, Indonesia.
